svg.text: Sunshine Town Home-Centered Road Network Plan V1
Road planning over V4 layout: Home is the hub; P0 school road, story bridge, shop branch, animal branch, and optional coast spur are separated for clear walking space.
- Home Plaza Hub H0 is the return center for all daily
- R1 is the only P0 emotional main road: Home -> School ->
- Story/Culture is a quiet bridge between school return and
- Shop and Animal are separate right-side branches so
storefronts and park objects do not crowd the main road.
- Coast U/X is an optional preview spur and must not become
- Road ribbons reserve visual space for actual walking
lanes, trees, signs, and touch targets.
Short loop inside home; keeps returning child to the
Primary emotional line: leave home, walk toward school and
Local school play loop; no classroom/test pressure.
Left-side cultural lane links school return and home.
Upper-right daily errand branch; does not block school
Lower-right animal/zoo loop with enough interior walking
Soft optional edge; beach umbrella and lost box, no P0
Short visible connector from driveway to shopping street.
Gentle garden path from home to animal park.
Proposal only: not applied to runtime JSON. H0-H7 and R0-R8 are draft road IDs for later data contracts.
